epigraph.quote: Lovely plain with distant hills all round. Daffodils (late spring)

per_stop.quote: 3 graves in middle of camp site, house wi. shutters, pond, bridge, Welsh flag, clean loo.
a beautiful walk at about 10.45 from Torpantau where the Brecon to Merthyr railway emerged from a tunnel.
We crossed the dam after having lunch in a sunny spot.
As we neared Crickhowell I telephoned Joan Clarke, now 92, + we went round to see her taking supper.
Four young men in one family died in WW2 in the RAF
We called in at Trampley on the way home + had tea in the summer house.
